description_long: This is a large, executive-style office desk made primarily of dark wood with metallic trim accents. The desk features a spacious rectangular work surface, with a computer monitor, keyboard, mouse, and a desktop tower placed on top, as well as a printer on an attached side cabinet. There is a high-backed, cushioned office chair with armrests positioned at the main working area. The desk includes multiple drawers on the right side, likely for storage of office supplies and documents. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for a professional workspace. The materials and finish suggest durability and a focus on both aesthetics and utility.
description: A large, modern executive office desk with a wood finish, metallic accents, and attached storage drawers, equipped for computer workstation use.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full desk surface, computer setup, and chair placement.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the high-backed chair, computer monitor, and the attached side cabinet with drawers and a printer.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the depth of the desk, the chair, and the side cabinet with the printer.
description_view_3: Front view showing the clean desk surface, metallic trim, and the main working area with the computer and chair.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge with the chair and computer setup, featuring drawers and a side cabinet to the right, and a clean front panel with metallic trim.
